title: EvidenceProviderRecord
description: Evidence provider registration record for R2 phase. Registers test-frame as a potential evidence source. R2 = evidence provider registration only. No test execution. No aggregator. No attribution. No CLI. No orchestrator. All reports are historical evidence. No current result is produced.

phase.description: The integration phase for this record. Must be R2 for evidence provider registration.

resource_id.description: Reference to the resource-registry record (e.g., res-testframe-003).

provider_type.description: Classification of the evidence provider by role. test_framework covers D:\test-frame. evidence_repository and report_repository cover read-only artifact sources. attribution_candidate and aggregation_candidate mark components that are registered but explicitly forbidden from execution.

source_root.description: Root path of the evidence source. Must be D:\test-frame.

source_status.description: Status of the source root directory. 'exists' means the directory is present and accessible for listing. 'not_found' means the path does not exist. 'partially_accessible' means some subdirectories are inaccessible.

evidence_roots.description: List of evidence source directories (e.g., evidence/, reports/, test-results/).

report_roots.description: List of report subdirectories within reports/ that contain historical report artifacts.

execution_tools.description: List of execution tools that are REGISTERED but CANNOT be run by R2. Includes: pytest, npm test, playwright, aggregator, attribution, cli, orchestrator.

read_only_artifacts.description: List of artifacts that CAN be read (directory listings, documentation). Includes: README, ARCHITECTURE, PIPELINE, directory listings.

historical_artifacts.description: Existing historical data paths within test-frame that may be used as context. These are NOT current results.

forbidden_actions.description: Actions explicitly forbidden on the evidence provider. Includes all execution, modification, and current-result claims.

allowed_actions.description: Actions currently permitted. Limited to: read_directory, read_docs, validate_json, git_status.

risk_level.description: Assessed risk level. test-frame is high risk because it contains executable test frameworks and historical data that could be mistaken for current results.

access_mode.description: Maximum access mode. Default is 'read_only'. Sub-components (aggregator, attribution, cli, orchestrator) are individually set to 'forbidden' or 'human_gated'.

contract_mapping.description: References to integration contracts that govern this provider.

evidence_index_mapping.description: How evidence from this provider maps to Contract 3: EvidenceIndex. Historical artifacts can populate evidence_id, artifact_path, artifact_type fields but must be marked as historical context, not current evidence.

attribution_policy.description: Description of attribution constraints. R2 does NOT allow attribution to produce GateResult. Attribution is registered as an attribution_candidate provider_type but remains in forbidden execution_policy.

current_result_policy.description: Policy for current results. MUST be exactly 'historical_only'. R2 cannot use any result as current. NOT 'current_after_approved_run'. NOT 'current_pass'.

execution_policy.description: Policy for execution. MUST be exactly 'forbidden'. R2 cannot execute tools. NOT 'human_gated'. NOT 'dry_run_allowed'.

human_gate_required.description: Whether human gate is required. MUST be true.

local_verification_status.description: Status of local verification for this evidence provider record.

verification_gaps.description: Known gaps in verification coverage. test-frame's primary gap: no test execution has been performed in this runtime, reports directory contains historical data only.

next_phase_blocked.description: Whether the next phase transition is blocked until conditions are met. MUST be true for R2 evidence provider registration.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this evidence provider record.

notes.description: Optional notes or warnings about this evidence provider.

registered_date.description: ISO8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this evidence provider record was created.

forbidden_actions: treat historical report as current pass
consume test-frame evidence in GateResult without reviewer approval
examples.evidence_index_mapping: Historical artifacts from test-frame can populate EvidenceIndex fields (evidence_id, artifact_path, artifact_type) but all artifacts must carry status=collected and include notes='historical context only -- not a current result'. GateResult evidence_ids may reference these but MUST NOT use them as gate-check evidence without reviewer approval.
examples.attribution_policy: Attribution is registered as an attribution_candidate provider_type with execution_policy=forbidden. R2 does not allow attribution to produce GateResult. Any attribution output from historical runs is context-only and must be treated as stale.
verification_gaps: no test execution has been performed in this runtime
reports directory contains historical data only
attribution has never produced a GateResult
orchestrator has never dispatched a task
